case_title: CAROLYN C FLAGIELLO VS. TOI REGISTER HAYES MRS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

NO COSTS AWARDED TO BY COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
